headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -152.8)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 58% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 185 quotes and 146 at strong intensity, pushing the score to 144.4 — people are venting forcefully today.
• This puts Frustrations near the top of the 180-day range (max 170.9), making today one of the most frustrated days on record.
• Fears recovered from yesterday's deeper low while Optimism also climbed, but both remain in negative territory.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
